  1. org.springframework.ai.mistralai.ocr

org.springframework.ai.mistralai.ocr

Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.mistralai.ocr
 
org.springframework.ai.model.mistralai.autoconfigure
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.mistralai.ocr used by org.springframework.ai.mistralai.ocr
    Class
    Description
    MistralAiOcrOptions
    Options for Mistral AI OCR requests.
    MistralAiOcrOptions.Builder
     
    MistralOcrApi.ExtractedImage
    Represents an extracted image from a page.
    MistralOcrApi.OCRModel
    List of well-known Mistral OCR models.
    MistralOcrApi.OCRPage
    Represents OCR information for a single page.
    MistralOcrApi.OCRPageDimensions
    Represents the dimensions of a PDF page's screenshot image.
    MistralOcrApi.OCRRequest
    Represents the request for the OCR API.
    MistralOcrApi.OCRRequest.Document
    Represents the document to be processed, which can be either a document URL or an image URL.
    MistralOcrApi.OCRResponse
    Represents the response from the OCR API.
    MistralOcrApi.OCRUsageInfo
    Represents usage information for the OCR request.

    Class
    Description
    MistralAiOcrOptions
    Options for Mistral AI OCR requests.
